name: Kaizer

skills.name: Demon Soul
skills.description: Basic Attacks and Skill 2 deal extra damage to single targets

skills.name: Vortex Brand
skills.description: Throws a ricocheting blade in the target direction, damaging and slowing enemies hit. The blade returns on hit, restoring Health and granting Move and Attack Speed.

skills.name: Blade Tempest
skills.description: Slashes twice, dealing damage. The second slash launches enemies and increases the damage of the next Basic Attack. Gains increased Health recovery, Mana recovery, and Movement Speed when out of combat.

skills.name: Invincible Warrior
skills.description: Becomes enhanced, gaining Movement Speed, max Health, Physical AttackBlock, and damaging nearby enemies over time.

tips: Kaizer (Tank): Tier S on international ranked — 51.38% WR.
Build core: Relentless Blade, Boots of Resistance, Axe of Torment.

patchHistory.change: Camp HOK — WR 51.38%, pick 1.63%, ban 0.17%, popularity tier S.
Counters Da Qiao, Diaochan, Daji · Weak into Donghuang, Kui, Sun Bin.

faqs.question: Is Kaizer good in current season?
faqs.answer: Kaizer is Tier S Tank with 51.38% win rate, 1.63% pick rate, and 0.17% ban rate on the international server (Camp HOK).

faqs.question: What is the best Kaizer build?
faqs.answer: Recommended item path: Relentless Blade, Boots of Resistance, Axe of Torment, Rapacious Bite, Nettle Gauntlet, Cuirass of Savagery. Spells and Arcana are listed on this page.

faqs.question: How to counter Kaizer?
faqs.answer: Strong picks into Kaizer: Donghuang, Kui, Sun Bin. Kaizer is strong into Da Qiao, Diaochan, Daji.

metaAnalysis: Counters: Da Qiao, Diaochan, Daji. Countered by: Donghuang, Kui, Sun Bin.
